accepted.reason: Core 3D traversal/summation loop is a clean standalone memory-access optimization kernel.
Chunked CSV grouping and key aggregation loop is reusable and conversion-friendly.
Layer compositing over fixed-size image buffers is a compact loop-based kernel.
Binary tagged-variant and VLQ parsing logic is deterministic and suitable for trace tasks.

skipped.reason: Closure/attribute behavior test code, not an optimization-target kernel.
Heavy solver-wrapper bindings and external library coupling.
Include-based framework integration and dependency graph too broad for standalone kernel extraction.
Async decorator framework logic, not focused on numeric/algorithmic optimization kernels.
Index builder depends on external FASTA APIs and IO pipeline coupling.
Tree-search node/object orchestration is framework-coupled control logic.
